theme_strategy.rationale: A 'Tactical Study' aesthetic based on Archetype 2 (Performance Pro) combined with Archetype 1 (Organic/Earthy) dark variants. The deep background reduces eye strain for students, while the muted, tactile accent colors (Sage, Terracotta, Bone White) make the environment feel grounded, focused, and non-corporate. This creates a 'Midnight Library' vibe perfect for intense study sessions.

typography.rules: The Anti-Default Rule applies. Avoid Inter, Roboto, Open Sans. Ensure tight letter spacing on large numbers.
typography.font_setup: Import via Google Fonts in index.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Manrope:wght@400;500;600&display=swap'); For Cabinet Grotesk: Use Fontshare API or a similar wide geometric sans like 'Outfit' if Cabinet Grotesk is unavailable (@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Outfit:wght@300;500;800;900&display=swap')).

colors.css_variables_instruction: Update the dark mode root variables in index.css to match this Midnight Library palette. Tint all grays with a subtle blue/slate hue. Use these custom action colors for the specific Add/Done buttons.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing & High Density Grid (Mode B). The layout must feel deeply functional but visually striking due to deliberate asymmetry.

sections.hero_counter: col-span-full md:col-span-8 row-span-2 min-h-[40vh] flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-card rounded-2xl border border-border/50 relative overflow-hidden. Use massive internal padding.
sections.stats_panel: col-span-full md:col-span-4 row-span-1 flex flex-col gap-4
sections.current_task: col-span-full md:col-span-4 row-span-1 p-6 bg-card rounded-2xl border border-border/50
sections.history_charts: col-span-full mt-8 p-6 bg-card rounded-2xl border border-border/50

surfaces_and_textures.cards: Neumorphic / Tactile Variant. Mix soft ambient shadow (shadow-2xl shadow-black/40) with sharp 1px inner top borders (border-t-white/5) to make cards feel like physical slabs of dark metal/slate.
surfaces_and_textures.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A0B0E]/70 border-b border-white/5. NEVER purely transparent.
surfaces_and_textures.textures: Apply a subtle noise/grain SVG overlay fixed to the background with opacity-20 to kill the digital flatness.

motion_and_interactions.counter_animation: CRITICAL: The core emotional moment is the number changing. Use Framer Motion. Wrap the number in <AnimatePresence mode='popLayout'> and slide it up/down (y: -20, opacity: 0) on change.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All buttons must explicitly set hover text color (e.g., hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white). Buttons should lift slightly (-translate-y-0.5) and increase shadow.
motion_and_interactions.focus_states: High contrast focus rings: focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:outline-none.
motion_and_interactions.reduced_motion: Ensure all animations respect prefers-reduced-motion media query.

components.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full) or sharp with 4px radius (rounded-sm) depending on the grid strictness. Let's use `rounded-xl` for a tactile, modern study tool feel. The '- Done' button should use the Sage Green color, and '+ Add' should use Terracotta.
components.inputs: Current Task input should be a seamless, inline-editable field. It shouldn't look like a standard Vercel input box. It should look like a blank notebook line or a transparent field with a subtle bottom border on focus.
components.charts: Use Recharts. Line chart for 'Overall Backlog' over time. Bar chart for 'Lectures Done per Day'. Style the charts to remove grid lines (or make them 5% opacity), use the accent colors (Sage/Terracotta) for the data marks.
components.toasts: Use `sonner`. Trigger a toast whenever a lecture is marked as 'Done' with motivational micro-copy ('1 Lecture Crushed!', 'Keep the momentum!').

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over the dark background meets APCA/WCAG AA standards. The muted foreground must be legible.
accessibility.test_ids: Add data-testid attributes to ALL interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='add-lecture-btn', data-testid='done-lecture-btn', data-testid='current-task-input', data-testid='main-counter').
accessibility.aria: Provide aria-labels for icon-only buttons. Hide decorative elements from screen readers.

instructions_to_main_agent: Read this JSON fully before starting implementation.
Initialize Shadcn UI and install the necessary components: card, button, input, table.
Install lucide-react for icons, framer-motion for the counter animation, recharts for history visualization, and sonner for toasts.
Create the 'UBC' Dashboard using a responsive CSS Grid.

Make the central counter the absolute focal point. Since headings are restricted to text-6xl, use text-6xl combined with scale transforms or absolute flex-grow layouts to optically maximize the number's presence without violating typographic scales.
Ensure the 'Current Task' is inline-editable, saving state dynamically.
Implement the 'Today's Stats' and Quick Actions (+ Add, - Done) alongside the main counter.
Mock the authentication flows and the backend API (use localStorage for the prototype) to store the counter, daily history, and tasks. HIGHLIGHT that it is MOCKED in your summary.
Do not use complete transparent background in header/overlays.
Inject the custom Font (Outfit/Cabinet Grotesk and Manrope) into index.css via Google Fonts or standard imports.
universal_guidelines: Do not converge toward generic outputs. Use the defined dark mode colors (avoid default Tailwind zinc/slate).
Do not center align the app container text-wise; left-align data and text unless it's the hero counter.
Create depth through layered design elements and subtle borders.
Use 2-3x more spacing. A cramped dashboard looks cheap.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
